title: Logical Stonecutter! (Sawblade)
description: Stonecutter Overhauled since 1.14, with 900+ logical interactions! Wood cutting, salvage items, unpolish, and more! Also includes in-game settings!
body:
Existed since 1.14, Sawblade is a datapack that overhauls the Stonecutter, adding over 900* interactions to it! These new interactions are designed to make Minecraft sense while also adding a lot more fun!
# 📜 Features: - Added **900+ new things** Stonecutter can process: - Cut wood into blocks! Functional blocks (doors/trapdoors) still requires crafting though. - Scrape off polish, wax, oxidation from blocks! - Salvage materials from Vanilla craftables! - You get the full amount back, **but can only choose one material**. - Craftables using replaceable materials can only be cut into what said materials can create. (For example: Wooden things can only be cut into Sticks) - For reasons found over the years, not all Vanilla craftables can be salvaged. - Stonecutter can also damage things standing on it! I mean, it is a huge sawblade. - There's a special case applied to Villagers because Masons have experience with these things. - Stonecutter also sends block updates each time damage is dealt, so you can do fun Redstone stuff! - **In-game Settings**: Customize Sawblade to fit your worlds! - To get started: `/function tdp.config:sawblade/damage` - Works well with [my other datapacks](https://modrinth.com/collection/Zz40EjyL)! - Works in Multiplayer! - Made and maintained with lots of care. Hope you enjoyed it!
![An animated icon showcasing Sawblade's core premise.](https://github.com/TheDiamondPlayables/assets2/blob/main/Datapacks/sawblade/icon_animated.gif?raw=true)
# 🤔 ***It's not working, help!*** - If you can't access in-game settings or debug commands, **open to LAN and enable Allow Commands**! - If you're in a Server, you'll need to `/op` yourself first! - Before 1.20.5, this option was called **Allow Cheats**. - For any other problems, you can [contact me personally here](https://thediamondplayables.com/contact)! - I'll personally respond to all help requests that's been sent here. Reply times may vary - there's just me working on all this, but I'll always help you out when I can. # 🎉 Special Thanks: Special thanks to these awesome people for keeping the lights on: [![A special thank you board for those who helped me keep the lights on, so I get to do this for you!](https://thediamondplayables.com/helpers)](https://thediamondplayables.com/support) If you like the effort that goes into making all this, [help me keep the lights on](https://thediamondplayables.com/support) so I get to do this more often! # 📝 PS: - Each version **was designed and optimized** for their respective Minecraft release, so you'll always **get the best performance and features possible** for the releases you're playing on. - I could make builds that supports multiple versions at once, but it also means adding extra stuff only to support game releases that it won't be run on. It just doesn't make sense to me. - Due to [Modrinth's limitations](https://thediamondplayables.com/modrinth_notes), this version is **not the best of what I've got**. [![Modrinth Edition notice. It's a simpler version made due to Modrinth's tech limits. You don't get all the features if you're using this release, and some things may not work as intended.](https://github.com/TheDiamondPlayables/assets2/blob/main/Random/modrinth_notice.gif?raw=true)](https://thediamondplayables.com/modrinth_notes) *: As of 1.21.11, there are 919 new interactions with the Stonecutter. I swear all of these are in here for a reason, I've made tools to make sure this is the case.
